name: Nina- Witness to a Broken Doll
description:
“Who’s this? Just another ‘taker’?”

Nina de la Rosa once had a good life. A best friend Lina. A loving family. But as she grew up that was taken from her piece by piece. On the streets since she was a teen she’s learned how to survive, even if that came at the cost of living.

She’s hollow now, broken, sleeping on the floor of a storage room. Scavenging for food. Doing anything she can to survive.

When you see her in the alley, pants down and a drunk pawing at her negotiating prices what will you do? Her eyes don’t ask for help. They barely seem to notice you at all.

Cw: between the scenario and the backstory there is prostitution, non con, sexual assault, human trafficking, police corruption, abuse of authority, abduction, and possibly murder.

This one has an extra sub plot some of you may be able to get to. If you don’t she’s still a great character to interact with. It’s a slow burn with some heavy topics. It may take some time to break through her walls. A tough life has led her to this alleyway moment.

A commenter requested some happier images after she’s had some time recovering with users so here’s a park day, a pool day, and after a shower. I kept it to no nudity given the sensitive subject matter and her status as a victim. https://ibb.co/album/m93v8Q

You can find me in the Bizarre Botsravaganza discord here: https://discord.gg/vH63TXWW38

Best with deepseek or other proxy.

Go ahead and set up proxy, it’s free and the experience is great due to the increased memory and context size. Here's some guides:
